headline: Reassessing Apollo Global Management (APO) After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Gains
summary: Wondering whether Apollo Global Management's current share price reflects its true value, or if the market is missing something important about this stock? The share price most recently closed at US$128.76, with returns declining 0.9% over the past week, 1.3% over the last month, 12.2% year to date and 0.2% over the past year. However, the stock is up 90.3% over three years and 147.7% over five years. Recent price moves have come alongside ongoing attention on Apollo Global Management's role...

headline: HGV Announces Pricing of Secondary Public Offering of Common Stock and Concurrent Share Repurchase
summary: ORLANDO, Fla., June 03, 2026--Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. (NYSE:HGV) ("HGV" or the "Company") today announced the pricing of the previously announced secondary public offering (the "offering") of 5,000,000 shares of the Company’s common stock held by certain entities managed by affiliates of Apollo Global Management, Inc.
